title: Molson Coors (TAP) Up 7.1% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
text: Molson Coors (TAP) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock?

title: Molson Coors: Q4 Earnings Might Be The Turning Point
text: Molson Coors is outperforming lately despite another mixed earnings report.

title: Coors Light Eliminates 6-pack Plastic Rings Globally
text: CHICAGO--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Coors Light today announced it will eliminate plastic rings from packaging globally, where Molson Coors owns brewing operations, and is set to become the largest beer brand in North America to move away from plastic rings. To support the move to more sustainable packaging, Molson Coors Beverage Company (NYSE: TAP) will invest $85 million, enabling Coors Light to begin the transition to fully recyclable and sustainably sourced cardboard-wrap carriers later this year.
